---
title: "KODAQS Team"
authors:
  - name: "Ladislav"
  - name: "David"
  - name: "Josefine"
  - name: "Lukas"
  - name: "Erik"
  - name: "Elnari"
  - name: "Soyeon"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 7
    fig-dpi: 300
    number-sections: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# Setup

```{r 00_setup}
#| label: 00_setup

options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cran.r-project.org"))
set.seed(2024)

if (!require("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
library(here)
here::i_am("kodaqs_team_quarto.qmd")

if (!require("pacman", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pacman")
library(pacman)

pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, jsonlite, glmnet, sessioninfo
)

# Output directory
output_dir <- here("output")
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


# code below was provided by DataFest and is available in the access_json.R


#drop n=1000 if you want to read everything
con_pageviews <- textConnection(readLines(
  gzfile("page_views.json.gz"),
  n = 1000
))
pageviews_sample <- stream_in(con_pageviews, verbose = FALSE)
close(con_pageviews)

con_arwiki <- textConnection(readLines(gzfile("arwiki.json.gz"), n = 1000))
arwiki_sample <- stream_in(con_arwiki, verbose = FALSE)
close(con_arwiki)

con_pageinfo <- textConnection(readLines(gzfile("page_info.json.gz"), n = 1000))
pageinfo_sample <- stream_in(con_pageinfo, verbose = FALSE)
close(con_pageinfo)

head(pageviews_sample)
head(arwiki_sample)
head(pageinfo_sample)
```



# Bot Analysis

```{r 01_bot-analysis}
#| label: 01_bot-analysis
#| file: src/01_bot-analysis.R
```


# Cross-Language Embedding Audit

```{r 02_cross-lang}
#| label: 02_cross-lang
#| file: src/02_cross-lang.R
```


# Bot Prediction Using sap-rpt-1-oss

```{r 03_bot-pred-prep}
#| label: 03_bot-pred-prep
#| file: src/03_bot-pred-prep.R
```


```{py 04_bot-pred-analysis}
#| label: 04_bot-pred-analysis
#| file: src/04_bot-pred-analysis.py
```



# Repository & Session Information

```{r 10_session_info}
#| label: 10_session_info

sessioninfo::session_info(pkgs = "attached", include_base = TRUE)
```

**Repository structure:**
```
repository/
├── kodaqs_team_quarto.qmd     # This file (main analysis script)
├── data/                      # files provided by the DataFest
│   ├── arwiki.json            # description
│   ├── dewiki.json            # description
│   ├── enwiki.json            # description
│   ├── eswiki.json            # description
│   ├── frwiki.json            # description
│   ├── itwiki.json            # description
│   ├── nlwiki.json            # description
│   ├── page_info.json         # description
│   ├── page_views.json        # description
│   ├── plwiki.json            # description
│   ├── ruwiki.json            # description
│   └── svwiki.json            # description
├── output/                    # Generated tables and plots
├── src/                       # Individual R code chunks
│   ├── access_json.R          # file provided by the DataFest
│   └── bot_analysis.R         # description
├── .gitignore
├── LICENSE
└── README.md
```
